title: History
seoDescription: Key milestones in the evolution of the Centre for Plant Medicine Research and Ghana's institutional commitment to plant-based medicine.
lede: Milestones that shaped the Centre's growth as a national institution for plant medicine research.
bodyParagraphs: CPMR's history reflects decades of public investment in understanding medicinal plants — from early herbal medicine practice to contemporary research, regulation, and clinical services.
The timeline below highlights institutional milestones. Dates and descriptions are maintained as verified institutional content and updated when new milestones are formally recorded.

milestones.title: Institutional foundations
milestones.description: National commitment to formal research into medicinal plants establishes the organisational roots of today's Centre.

milestones.title: Research capacity expansion
milestones.description: Laboratory and field research programmes broaden to support quality assurance and collaboration with universities and health agencies.

milestones.title: Clinical and public services
milestones.description: Outpatient and specialist services integrate with research missions, linking community care to evidence-based plant medicine practice.

milestones.title: Regulatory and industry support
milestones.description: Drug analysis and industry-facing services strengthen national safeguards for herbal product quality and manufacturer compliance.

milestones.title: National research centre
milestones.description: CPMR operates as Ghana's centre of excellence for plant medicine research, education, and responsible innovation.
